core_mechanism: a recurrent state realized as the parameters of an inner model that are updated online by gradient descent on each incoming element of a stream, so an arbitrarily long history is compressed into weight space and recalled at fixed per-step cost (learning-as-memory / fast weights)
brief_reason: The abstract states the method's recurrent state consists of fast weights updated by gradient descent during both training and inference, compressing histories into weight space and retrieving contextual information, which is the transferable machinery independent of the robotics application.
